hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *package-lock.json) echo 'Blocked: package-lock.json is generated. Change dependencies in package.json and run "npm install" instead of editing the lock file directly.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd /Users/noah/Projects/wheely-weather && npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/noah/Projects/wheely-weather && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 ;; esac
